Never Miss a Boiler Breakdown — Even at 2am

Boiler breakdowns, emergency heating, annual services, gas safety certificates. Katie answers every call you miss, captures the fault details, and sends them to your WhatsApp in 3 seconds. From £59/month — less than one callout fee.

🔧 Job: Worcester Bosch Greenstar — no hot water or heating

PlumbersElectriciansBuildersRoofersLocksmithsLandscapersHeating EngineersPest ControlCleanersDrainageJoinersPlasterersTilersCarpentersHandymen
The Problem

Why Heating Engineers Lose Jobs to Missed Calls

Boiler breakdowns are urgent, emotional, and time-sensitive. Customers with no heating in January will call 3-4 engineers. The first to answer — or at least capture the call professionally — gets the job.

Boiler breakdowns peak when you're under a sink or up a loft

January freeze hits. Phones ring constantly. But you're crawling in a loft space, under a kitchen sink, or in a cramped airing cupboard. You physically cannot answer. That 'no heating' call goes to your competitor who books a £180 callout while you're still wrestling with a compression fitting.

Emergency calls need fast triage — voicemail wastes 20 minutes

A voicemail saying 'my boiler's broken' tells you nothing. Is it a £50 pressure top-up or a £4,000 replacement? Katie captures: fault description, boiler make/model, property age, and whether there's hot water. You call back with parts already in the van.

Heating emergencies don't wait for business hours

Boiler breakdowns happen at 6am before work, 10pm when the kids are in bed, and all weekend long. While you're having your Sunday dinner, missed calls stack up. By Monday, those freezing customers have already found another engineer on Checkatrade.

Annual service reminders slip through the cracks

Service customers call to book their annual boiler service. If you miss the call, they often just go to the next engineer on their list. Katie captures every service enquiry with property details, preferred dates, and even sets up recurring annual reminders — building your predictable maintenance pipeline.

How It Works

How Katie Works for Heating Engineers

Four simple steps from missed call to booked callout. Katie handles the conversation. You handle the heating. Read our complete guide to AI call answering for more details.

1

Boiler breaks — customer calls

Katie answers with your heating company's greeting. She identifies if it's an emergency breakdown, annual service, gas safety certificate, or installation enquiry.

2

Heating-specific qualification

Captures: boiler make/model (if known), fault description, property type and age, whether it's rented, and urgency level. Emergency breakdowns get priority flagging.

3

WhatsApp with diagnostic context

Alert shows: 'Vaillant EcoTEC — no hot water — pressure at 0.5 bar — 1960s semi — rented — tenant contact — emergency callback' with customer number and property details.

4

Accept emergency or schedule service

For breakdowns: tap to accept and arrive prepared with the right parts. For services: schedule annual maintenance at customer's preferred time. Landlord enquiries get batch-scheduled efficiently.

How Whoza Works

From missed call to captured enquiry — automatically.

01

We Set Up Whoza on Your Number

Forward your number to Whoza. Live and answering calls in 30 minutes. No tech skills, no engineers, no downtime.

30 min
02

We Answer Your Calls

Katie or Mark answers every call, qualifies the enquiry, and sends it to your phone.

24/7
03

You Accept Jobs and Get Paid

Real enquiries land on your phone. Tap to accept, call back or decline. Enquiry captured.

Instant
04

Only Continue If It's Working

See real results first. No upfront cost. Cancel anytime if it's not right for you.

No commitment

No website? No problem.

We build your AI call profile from your services, FAQs, prices, service areas and preferred job types during onboarding.

We only make money, when you make money

Your AI Revenue Team

Meet Katie, Mark, Claire & Rex

Four AI specialists working together to answer calls, capture enquiries, collect reviews and show you what to improve next.

Call Capture

Katie

Female VoiceCustomisable

Katie answers calls 24/7, qualifies real customer enquiries, and sends them to WhatsApp while you work. Friendly, professional and calm under pressure - she helps customers feel heard before the enquiry reaches you.

Sample greeting:

"Hi, you've reached Thompson Plumbing. My name is Katie. How can I help you today?"

Ready to accept, call back or decline.

Call Capture

Mark

Male VoiceCustomisable

Mark answers calls 24/7, qualifies real customer enquiries, and sends them to WhatsApp while you work. Clear, efficient and professional - ideal if you prefer a direct male voice.

Sample greeting:

"Hi, you've reached Wilson Electrics. This is Mark speaking. What can I do for you?"

Job type, urgency, location and customer details captured.

Review Collection

Claire

Claire turns completed jobs into reviews

Claire follows up after completed work to request reviews while the customer still remembers the good service. Polite, timely and consistent - she helps turn good jobs into future trust.

Hi John, thanks for choosing Thompson Plumbing yesterday. If you were happy with the service, would you mind leaving us a quick review? It really helps. [Google review link]

More reviews. More trust. More customers choosing you.

Included in Growth plan and above.

Competitor Insights

Rex

Rex shows what to fix next

Rex checks your competitors, reviews and AI visibility, then turns the data into simple actions you can use each week.

Your nearest competitor has 41 reviews. You have 32. Action this week: request 5 more reviews from recent customers and reply to your last 3 Google reviews.

Clear weekly actions to improve visibility and help AI search recommend your business.

Monthly competitor analysis on every plan. Weekly actions from Growth upwards.

Choose the voice and name that fits your business. Switch anytime.

What happens after you sign up?

Live in less than 30 minutes. Here's how.

Step 1

Choose your AI assistant

Pick Katie, Mark, or choose any male or female assistant name you prefer.

Step 2

Select your voice and add your business details

Choose a male or female voice from the dropdown, then add your services, service area, hours, FAQs and preferred job types.

Step 3

We build your AI call profile and business knowledge base

Whoza creates the information your assistant uses to answer calls, qualify enquiries and route details correctly.

Step 4

You approve a test call

Listen to how your assistant handles a real-style customer enquiry and request edits if needed.

Step 5

Your Whoza agent goes live on your number

Once approved, your AI assistant starts answering calls and sending qualified enquiries straight to your phone.

Simple pricing that scales with your business. Most customers cover their cost in their first few jobs. Only continue if it's working for you.

Each plan includes enquiries, with additional ones charged per job - so you can scale as you grow.

Start small. Only pay more as you get more work.

Additional call handling minutes are charged at £0.26 per minute across all plans. You can monitor and control usage at any time.

AI Call Answering for Heating Engineers in Your City

Katie answers calls for heating engineers across the UK. Find your location:

LondonManchesterBirminghamLeedsGlasgowBristolLiverpoolEdinburgh
Got Questions?

Heating Engineer FAQ

Everything you need to know about AI call handling for heating engineering businesses

How much does AI call handling cost for heating engineers?

Whoza.ai starts at £59/month for the Starter plan. One captured boiler breakdown averages £120-£200 callout. A full boiler replacement can be £2,500-£4,500. At £59/month, one emergency callout pays for the whole year. Overage minutes are billed at £0.26/minute.

Plans start at £59/month. See full pricing and plan details.

Can Katie handle emergency boiler breakdown calls at 6am on a Sunday?

Yes. Katie answers 24/7, including weekends, bank holidays, and early mornings. She identifies emergency heating keywords like 'no heating', 'no hot water', 'boiler not working', 'leaking boiler', 'pilot light out', 'pressure dropped' — and marks the enquiry as emergency priority. You get an immediate WhatsApp with 'BOILER EMERGENCY — URGENT' in the header, even at 2am on Christmas morning.

What information does Katie collect from heating customers?

Katie collects: full name, phone number, postcode, property type (house/flat/commercial), boiler make and model (if known), fault description (no heating/no hot water/leaking/strange noise/pressure issue/pilot light), property age, whether it's a rented property, landlord details if applicable, and how they found you.

Can Katie distinguish between a service call and an emergency breakdown?

Yes. Katie is trained to identify urgency from the customer's language. 'Annual service' or 'gas safety certificate' goes to routine scheduling. 'No heating', 'leaking boiler', 'strange smell', or 'pilot light keeps going out' gets emergency priority. She also asks specific diagnostic questions to help you assess urgency before you even call back.

Does Katie handle landlord gas safety certificate enquiries?

Yes. Katie identifies landlord-specific calls by keywords like 'gas safety certificate', 'CP12', 'landlord', 'tenant', or 'rental property'. She captures the number of properties, number of appliances per property, preferred inspection dates, and tenant contact details. Landlord enquiries get flagged as 'landlord/multi-property' in your dashboard for efficient batch scheduling.

How does whoza.ai help with annual service scheduling?

Katie captures service enquiries with full details: boiler make/model (if known), last service date, property address, preferred date range, and whether it's a single boiler or multiple appliances. She can also ask if the customer wants a recurring annual service reminder, building your repeat business pipeline automatically.

Can Katie handle calls about central heating installation quotes?

Yes. Katie captures installation enquiries with: property type and size, number of radiators, current heating system (combi/system/regular/none), fuel type (gas/LPG/oil/electric), property age, budget range, and timeline. These high-value enquiries (£3,000-£8,000+) get flagged as 'installation quote' for priority follow-up.

Will customers trust an AI with their boiler emergency?

Katie introduces herself as your AI assistant and explains that she's capturing details so you can call back prepared. Most customers are relieved to speak to someone immediately rather than leaving a voicemail. In our surveys, 89% of callers are satisfied with the AI experience, and heating customers particularly appreciate that Katie captures fault details that help you diagnose before you arrive.

Heating Engineer Testimonial
"I was under a floorboard in Solihull fixing a leak when my phone rang three times. Two were annual service bookings. One was a boiler replacement in Edgbaston worth £3,800. Katie captured all three with full details — boiler models, addresses, tenant contacts. I called back at 5pm and booked the replacement for Thursday. The service calls I scheduled for next month."
RK

Robert Khan

Khan Heating Solutions, Birmingham

One Boiler Replacement Pays for 5 Years of Katie

Emergency callouts average £120-£200. Boiler replacements are £2,500-£4,500. Full central heating installations can exceed £8,000. At £59/month, capturing one missed replacement pays for 5 years of service.
